content.body:
- JSONAdapter: full CRUD with schema validation and automatic index rebuild
- ClaudeAdapter: generates CLAUDE.md from .leo/ config + profile + KB rules,
  registers hooks in settings.json, detects runtime
- Config: .leo/config.yaml loading/saving with sane defaults
- Profiles: YAML-based specialist profiles with 2 built-in (generalist, backend-engineer)
- KB schema: Go-native validation matching the JSON schema rules
- Tests: JSONAdapter (write, read, delete, query, bulk, health, index rebuild),
  ClaudeAdapter (context file generation, hooks, detection)

Closes #16, closes #17, closes #18

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cli): implement StorageAdapter, RuntimeAdapter, config, profiles, and KB validation
